text.title: Feedback Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Feedback Management end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: capture
step.action: Route every channel into one inbox.

step.name: triage
step.action: Daily 30 min: tag theme + severity; assign next action.

step.name: classify
step.action: Group into themes; track volume per theme weekly.
